Docs Blog
Introduction Context windows

Context windows

Claude Code keeps recent messages, tool results, and project instructions inside the active context window.

When the window grows too large, compaction summarizes older work so the session can keep moving.

What stays available

  • Project instructions are reloaded from disk when the session resumes.
  • Recent tool results stay visible until the next compaction boundary.
Input After compaction
Recent messages Summarized into the compacted conversation state.

On this page

What stays available
